content.speakerText: How much would you like to deposit as your opening balance?
content.speakerTextCn: 您想存多少作为初始余额？
content.explanation: 正确答案'I'll put in $1,000.'使用了场景中强调的主动存款表达方式。选项2强调'cash'，但对话未涉及现金形式；选项3是取款，与存款语境相反；选项4是陈述现状，未回应对方的询问意图。

content.speakerText: Your account number is 8842-1095, and your card will arrive in 5–7 business days.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的账号是8842-1095，卡片将在5到7个工作日内寄到。

options.text: Thanks! Can I get a digital copy now?
Can you send me another card?
When will the money be deposited?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了'Can I...?'礼貌请求额外服务，符合场景使用说明。选项2请求额外卡片，语境不符；选项3否定需求，缺乏礼貌回应；选项4偏离主题，询问存款时间而非卡片。

content.speakerText: We've confirmed your deposit of $1,200. Would you like to set up online banking now?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已确认您存入的1200美元。您现在想开通网上银行吗？

options.text: Yes, please. That would be very helpful.

content.explanation: 正确答案积极回应服务提议，语气礼貌自然。选项2与问题无关；选项3重复确认已告知信息；选项4提出相反需求，语境冲突。

content.template: I'd like ___ deposit $500 as my opening balance.
content.hint: 表达意愿时使用固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（预约/存款场景核心句型）

content.template: Could you please email me a ___ copy of my account details?
content.hint: 与'card will arrive by mail'相对的服务请求
content.knowledgePoint: 数字服务相关词汇（digital copy）

content.template: I'll ___ in $800 to open the account.
content.hint: 场景中强调的主动存款动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: put in（存款场景核心动词搭配）

content.speakerText: How much would you like to deposit as your opening balance?
content.speakerTextCn: 您想存多少作为初始余额？
expectedAnswers: I'd like to deposit $700, if that's okay.
I have $550 — can I use that as my opening balance?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确回应存款金额
语言准确性：语法正确，无拼写或时态错误
表达自然度：使用场景关键词如'put in'或'deposit'，语气自然
关键词覆盖：包含金额和存款动词

content.speakerText: Your account number is 8842-1095, and your card will arrive in 5–7 business days.
content.speakerTextCn: 您的账号是8842-1095，卡片将在5到7个工作日内寄到。
expectedAnswers: Thanks! Can I get a digital copy sent to my email?
Got it — I'll keep an eye on my mailbox.
That’s great. Could you also send me a confirmation email?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：正确回应账户信息并提出合理请求或确认
语言准确性：使用恰当的礼貌用语和时态
表达自然度：符合银行服务对话习惯，无生硬表达
关键词覆盖：使用'digital copy', 'email', 'mailbox'等场景词汇

content.speakerText: We've successfully processed your deposit of $1,000. Is there anything else you'd like to do today?
content.speakerTextCn: 我们已成功处理您1000美元的存款。今天您还需要办理其他业务吗？
expectedAnswers: No, that's all for now. Thanks!
Actually, could I set up direct deposit next week?
Yes, please help me link my savings account to this one.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：清晰回应是否需要进一步服务
语言准确性：使用恰当的句式和礼貌表达
表达自然度：符合银行服务结尾对话习惯
关键词覆盖：使用'direct deposit', 'link account'等金融场景词汇
